1100 Lincoln Rd #833Miami BeachFL33139
Experience South Beach living in this spacious 1-bedroom, 1.5-bathroom condo at The Decoplage, featuring stunning ocean views from every room. This elegant residence boasts tile floors, impact-resistant windows and balcony doors, an open kitchen with granite countertops, and full storage. Located on the beach promenade and steps from Lincoln Road Mall, The Decoplage offers resort-style amenities, including a heated pool, fitness center, recreation room, 24-hour security, and valet parking. Don't miss this prime opportunity!RentPath12$400010

Built in 2021 Covered Parking Available One of the Closest Urbana Buildings to the Engineering Campus! Located on South Side of University Avenue - No Crossing Busy Streets! Secure Building with FOB Entry System Close to Carle Hospital and OSF Hospitals Many Restaurants Nearby Some Units Have Balconies Fitness Center with Modern NordicTrack Equipment Retail Space on the First Floor Plank Flooring Throughout Stainless Steel Appliance Package Fully Furnished Unit with Full Sized Beds Washer/Dryer in Each Unit Smart TV in Living Room Tenant pays Electric/Gas A Utility Fee of $55 per bed will be assessed for Internet, Trash, Recycling, Water and UC Sanitary Lease Dates: 8/18/26-7/31/27 (Payments are based on a 12 installment lease)BUILDIUM22$207510

Nestled in the heart of Midtown, you'll have easy access to Miami's best dining, shopping, andentertainment options. This unit boasts a well-designed floor plan with a comfortable living space, perfect for relaxation and entertaining. Resort-Style Amenities: gym, pool, hot tub, and tennis courts. The building also has amedia room, perfect for movie nights or gaming. Don't miss out on this fantastic opportunity to live in one of Miami's most desirable locations! Experience the pinnacle of luxury living in this exquisite 1 Bed + Den, 1 Bath fully furnished apartment at the prestigious Hyde Suites & Residences. With soaring high ceilings and premium finishes throughout, this home features a spacious open-concept eat-in kitchen and a private terrace for ultimate relaxation. Indulge in world-class amenities, including a tennis court, state-of-the-art fitness center with a spinning studio, a rejuvenating spa offering massage services, and a steam room with showers. Stay longer, save more: 6-Month Minimum base rent: starts at $2570/mo 12-Month Minimum base rent: starts at $2540/mo Landing offers flexible leases across a network of over 35,000 fully-furnished apartments throughout 375+ cities so you can rent on your terms, practically anywhere, and avoid the hassle of paying deposits or application fees. Visit hellolanding.com to learn about all the benefits of a Landing membership, see our competitive up-to-date pricing, explore available apartments, take virtual tours, and make reservations online without jumping through traditional rental hoops. Landing's apartments at Address East End are designed for comfortable, easy living, with the ability to stay as long as you like. Experience living with Landing Every apartment is outfitted with all the modern essentials including: custom-designed furnishings, a fully-equipped kitchen with deluxe stainless steel appliances, a gourmet coffee maker, premium linens, Smart TVs, and incredibly fast, reliable internet for working from home. When you live with Landing, you'll enjoy a hassle-free experience with the added benefit of 24/7 access to our dedicated member experience team. Some of the nitty-gritty: a background check and proof of income are required; we're completely smoke-free; bundled utility packages and pricing vary based on length of stay; pet-friendly options available; listed price reflects a 12-month minimum stay.HELLOLANDING22$254010

1412600 S Sepulveda Blvd unit Unit 306Los AngelesCA90064
Green Park is a six-story, 53-unit luxury apartment building located at the corner of Sepulveda Boulevard and Richland Avenue. Ideally positioned for commuters and students alike, the building is just seconds from the Culver City bus line to UCLA and a short five-minute walk to the Expo Line, which offers direct access to USC and Santa Monica College. Each apartment features a contemporary design with efficient layouts and comes with high-speed internet of 1000mbps with equally fast upload and download speeds. The building's spacious, furnished lobby offers a comfortable setting to relax or work remotely, while the adjacent mirrored fitness center includes an outdoor workout area. On the top floor, residents can enjoy a beautifully furnished recreation room complete with a kitchen, bathroom, and expansive wraparound deck offering sweeping views. In addition, two fully furnished rooftop decks provide panoramic vistas of downtown Los Angeles and the Pacific Ocean, perfect for entertaining or simply enjoying the sunset.CLAW44$539510

1512637 Ellendale Pl unit 03Los AngelesCA90007
Water Utility Included: Individual Hot Water Heaters. This apartment has 3 private bedrooms. Approximate Measurements: LR: 132" X 93" Rm 1: 156" X 123" Rm 2: 156" X 123" Rm 3: 129" X 111". One of the most beautiful buildings on Ellendale. The apartments are immaculate and always well-maintained. The building is a ten-minute walk to USC; Tram B stops right outside. Rental amount is based on one person per sleeping room. Additional occupants, if allowed, increase the rent by $300 per additional person. Onsite Manager. Gated Parking available for $100 Per Month.BUILDIUM31$310010

1812855 Arapahoe St unit 1-1103DenverCO80205
Experience the best of Denver living at CURTIS PARK REDEVELOPMENT. Conveniently located in the heart of the city, this apartment complex offers a range of amenities designed to enhance your lifestyle. Stay active with our on-site fitness center or enjoy some outdoor fun at the playground. Each apartment comes equipped with a washer and dryer, saving you time and trips to the laundromat. Parking is never a hassle with our dedicated spaces, and with RTD Transit nearby, commuting around Denver is a breeze. The beautiful Curtis Park is just a stone's throw away, perfect for picnics, walks, or simply enjoying the outdoors. Our professional groundskeeping and landscaping services ensure that the complex always looks its best. Choose CURTIS PARK REDEVELOPMENT for a comfortable, convenient, and vibrant living experience in Denver, CO.APPFOLIO_FREE22$215010

Parking is never a hassle with our dedicated spaces, and with RTD Transit nearby, commuting around Denver is a breeze. The beautiful Curtis Park is just a stone's throw away, perfect for picnics, walks, or simply enjoying the outdoors. Our professional groundskeeping and landscaping services ensure that the complex always looks its best. Choose CURTIS PARK REDEVELOPMENT for a comfortable, convenient, and vibrant living experience in Denver, CO.APPFOLIO_FREE22$215010

1912901 Boston Ave unit D-15Des MoinesIA50310
Welcome to Clover Creek! Experience contemporary comfort and convenience in our serene neighborhood at Clover Creek Our pet-friendly community provides a variety of spacious Studio, 1, 2, and 3 bedroom units tailored to suit your lifestyle. Apartment Features & Amenities: - Enjoy the luxury of private patios or balconies (availability varies by floor). - Benefit from complimentary parking for your convenience. - Garages are also available for added convenience! - We're a pet-friendly community, welcoming up to 2 pets per unit with a one-time non-refundable pet fee plus a monthly pet rent of per pet. Screening Criteria: - Ensure that your household gross monthly income is 2.5 times the base rent. - Maintain a minimum credit score of 525. - No collections (excluding student loans and medical payments). - Uphold a clean criminal history and rental record. - Provide a valid US ID or SSN, or have a cosigner with a valid US ID or SSN. Utility Policies: - Common area utilities (electric, water, sewer, and trash) are arranged by the landlord. Apply today and immerse yourself in the perfect blend of modern living and tranquility at Clover Creek. Your new home is waiting! *Income RestrictedAPPFOLIO_FREE11$68510

2013003 Transport St SE unit 025-DAlbuquerqueNM87106
Our Newly Renovated, Gated Luxury Homes have Full bathrooms in every room, Bedrooms, Extra Rooms and Offices! Even though you will love cooking in our spacious kitchen on our all-Chrome appliances, it's our Outdoor Grilling station at the Clubhouse you will want to use every chance you get! Our Outdoor Clubhouse area is open 10am-10pm and features a sparkling, uniquely designed, 2 tier Olympic Size Pool, Hot Tub, Volleyball Court and a Two Grill Deluxe BBQ grilling station with chairs! Our Main Clubhouse is open 24/7 and , business center with private rooms, free WiFi and printing and a 2-story gym with sauna, steam room and tanning beds. We didn't forget our pets; we have several great Pet Parks and Pet Washing areas for them. We have the latest in the Self-Serve Ice and Water Mill, no more puddles on your floorboard from melting ice! Diamond Estates Luxury Homes already Welcomed You Home, your keys are ready! COMING SOON: Basketball Court, Playground areas and a Sprinkler Water Park to cool off! AMENITIES 24-hour availability, Accent walls, Bilingual, Business center, Clubhouse, Conference room, Elevator, Fitness center, Free weights, Lounge Area, Gated, High speed internet, Outdoor Cameras, Night patrol, On-site management, Package receiving service, Parking, Playground, Pool, Recycling, Sauna, , Spa, Sundeck, Volleyball court, Wheelchair access, Wireless internetBUILDIUM01$69910

Well illuminated furnished unit with stunning Open floor Plan, Corner unit, studio with 1 Bedroom and nice views, completely updated, Building has a very convenience location with walking distance to: Brickell Citi Centre, Mary Brickell Village, Bayside, Restaurants and much more. Unit is Move in ready with stainless steel appliances. Enjoy the great Amenities offered at The Infinity building like: Gyn, Pool, Sauna, Jacuzzi, 24 Hours Security, Doorman & Valet Parking. For showing instructions please contact Co-Listing Agent: Mariajulieta Valencia.RentPath11$280010
25260 SW 13th St #2413MiamiFL33130
Nestled just a block from Brickell's vibrant heart, this charming, well managed building offers the perfect location with amazing amenities. Walkable to Brickell's best restaurants and shops, this building is a quaint haven with 24-hour security. The 1-bed, 1.5 bath 2-story duplex boasts mesmerizing city and water views from both upstairs and downstairs balconies. Indulge in the convenient lobby cafe's delicious offerings. 1 parking spot included plus valet services available. This meticulously well kept residence harmonizes location, amenities, and charm.RentPath12$280010

261601 S Mesa Hills Dr unit Apt. 0612 - The Mesa VerdeEl PasoTX79912
The Preserve at Mesa Hills is located on the West side of El Paso, Texas near UTEP. The community is surrounded by high end shops, entertainment, and restaurants for a good time with friends and family. Enjoy coming home to our beautiful community with gorgeous Franklin Mountain views, tall, pine trees and gorgeous, green grass surround our one, and two bedroom apartments. We have 6 different spacious floor plans with black or stainless steel appliances, walk in closets, balconies, washer/dryers and fireplaces, that will fit exactly what you are looking for. Our spacious one and two bedroom apartment and town-home's include washer and dryer hookups, black on black appliances, faux wood floors, updated lighting and plumbing fixtures, fireplaces, spacious closets, and so much more! Our community extends an array of amenities from our sparkling swimming pool, 24 hour fitness center, business center, playground, picnic area with BBQ grills, covered parking, and Pet Park. Indian Springs is conveniently located minutes away from bus transportation and easy access to I-10 freeway.APPFOLIO_FREE22$123510

2716034 National Blvd #522Ave MariaFL34142
A beautifully designed 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom condo located in the prestigious National Golf & Country Club at Ave Maria. This move-in-ready home offers the perfect blend of comfort, modern living, and resort-style amenities in one of Southwest Florida's most desirable communities. Step inside to a bright, open-concept floor plan featuring a modern kitchen with quartz countertops, stainless steel appliances, and ample cabinet space. The kitchen flows seamlessly into the dining and living areas, creating a spacious and inviting atmosphere for entertaining or relaxing. Enjoy your morning coffee or evening sunset from the screened-in lanai, offering peaceful views of lake, golf course and preserve and fresh Florida breezes. Also enjoy covered parking, easy elevator access in unit washer and dryer. The primary suite includes a walk-in closet and a private en-suite bathroom, while the second bedroom and full bath are perfect for guests. As a resident, you'll enjoy bundled golf membership and access to exceptional amenities including a championship golf course, resort-style pool, clubhouse, fitness center, tennis and pickleball courts, and spa services, all within minutes of Ave Maria's charming town center with dining, shopping, and more.RentPath22$579510
2726034 National Blvd #523Ave MariaFL34142
Welcome to your vacation oasis at The National Golf and Country Club in the charming town of Ave Maria, Florida! Step into this beautiful Birkdale-style unit, perfectly positioned to overlook a peaceful nature preserve, a pristine golf course, and a sparkling lake. Mornings on the lanai? Absolute perfection--coffee has never tasted better. Golf lovers, you're in for a treat! Enjoy exclusive access to the prestigious Gordon Lewis-designed course, with transfer of golf as an option. That's just the beginning... The National also features a stunning resort-style pool with a Tiki bar, a brand-new clubhouse with an incredible restaurant and bar, plus pickleball, tennis, bocce ball, a full gym, fitness studio, day spa--you name it. This is the year to treat yourself. Ave Maria ~ Once you get here, you "get it."RentPath22$579510
2736034 National Blvd #533Ave MariaFL34142
Live the resort lifestyle in this stunning fully furnished, turnkey 2 bedroom, 2 bathroom Birkdale condo on the 3rd floor, offering breathtaking views of the lake, lush preserve, and the 14th hole of the Gordon Lewis-designed championship golf course. With a full golf membership included, this unit is the perfect blend of luxury, convenience, and leisure. Inside, the smart split-bedroom layout ensures privacy for guests while keeping the main living spaces bright and connected. The spacious primary suite features dual closets and tranquil views, creating a peaceful retreat. The modern chef's kitchen is a true standout, with a large center island, luxurious quartz countertops, and seamless flow into the open-concept living and dining areas--ideal for entertaining or simply unwinding with a view. Elevator access and assigned covered parking add comfort and ease, and the unit comes fully equipped with all appliances, making it truly move-in ready. Situated within the gates of The National Golf & Country Club, residents enjoy access to a championship 18-hole golf course, a resort-style zero-entry pool with lap lanes, a poolside bar and grill, Har-Tru tennis courts, pickleball, bocce ball, a state-of-the-art fitness center, relaxing sauna, indulgent day spa, and a brand new clubhouse offering both casual and fine dining, indoors and out. Beyond the gates, the vibrant town of Ave Maria offers even more to explore, from charming parks and a fun-filled water park to unique dining, boutique shopping, and regular community events at the Town Center. Whether you're looking for a seasonal retreat or a year-round residence, this exceptional condo offers the ultimate in comfort, luxury, and leisure. Don't miss your opportunity, schedule your private showing today!RentPath22$579510
2746034 National Blvd #537Ave MariaFL34142
Step into luxury with this turnkey, fully furnished 3rd-floor Birkdale condo, offering breathtaking views of the lake and lush preserve. Boasting a full golf membership, this beautifully maintained 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom residence blends comfort, style, and convenience in every detail. The smart split-bedroom floor plan ensures privacy for guests while keeping the main living areas open and connected. The spacious primary suite features dual closets and serene views, creating a peaceful retreat at the end of the day. A bright, open kitchen with a large center island and luxurious quartz countertops flows seamlessly into the living and dining spaces, making it ideal for entertaining or simply enjoying the view. Elevator access and assigned covered parking add to the ease of everyday living, while all appliances are included--truly move-in ready. Located within the gates of The National Golf & Country Club at Ave Maria, you'll enjoy exclusive access to resort-style amenities that make every day feel like a vacation. Play a round on the championship 18-hole golf course, relax by the zero-entry pool with lap lanes, enjoy casual bites at the poolside bar and grill, or stay active with Har-Tru tennis courts, pickleball, and bocce ball. A state-of-the-art fitness center, rejuvenating sauna, indulgent day spa, and a brand-new clubhouse offering both casual and fine dining indoors and out round out the lifestyle. Just beyond the gates, the charming town of Ave Maria offers parks, dining, shopping, a fun-filled water park, and regular community events at the Town Center. Whether you're looking for a seasonal escape, year-round residence, or investment property, this exceptional condo delivers the perfect balance of comfort, luxury, and leisure. Don't miss your opportunity, schedule your private tour today!RentPath22$579510
2756034 National Blvd #542Ave MariaFL34142
Stunning Birkdale Condo for Rent in The National Golf & Country Club at Ave Maria. Experience resort-style living in this beautifully maintained 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom Birkdale condo. Situated on the top floor, this condo offers breathtaking golf course and lake views from the private, screened lanai, the perfect space for both relaxation and entertaining. Inside, you'll find a bright, open floor plan featuring high-end finishes throughout. The kitchen is a chef's dream, with granite countertops, stainless steel appliances, and custom cabinetry. The spacious living area flows effortlessly into the dining space, making it ideal for hosting guests or enjoying quiet nights in. The master suite is a true retreat, featuring dual walk-in closets and a spa-like en-suite bath with a walk-in shower, providing both comfort and privacy. The guest bedroom is generously sized and offers plenty of space for visitors or family. As a resident of this bundled golf community, you'll have access to world-class amenities, including an 18-hole championship golf course, resort-style pool, fitness center, tennis and pickleball courts, and a stunning clubhouse (coming soon). In addition, this prime location offers easy access to shopping, dining, and the vibrant Ave Maria community. Whether you're looking for a seasonal retreat or a full-time residence, this condo offers the perfect balance of luxury, convenience, and an active lifestyle. Don't miss the opportunity to live in this incredible community and make this beautiful condo your home!RentPath22$579510

Situated within the gates of The National Golf & Country Club, residents enjoy access to a championship 18-hole golf course, a resort-style zero-entry pool with lap lanes, a poolside bar and grill, Har-Tru tennis courts, pickleball, bocce ball, a state-of-the-art fitness center, relaxing sauna, indulgent day spa, and a brand new clubhouse offering both casual and fine dining, indoors and out. Beyond the gates, the vibrant town of Ave Maria offers even more to explore, from charming parks and a fun-filled water park to unique dining, boutique shopping, and regular community events at the Town Center. Whether you're looking for a seasonal retreat or a year-round residence, this exceptional condo offers the ultimate in comfort, luxury, and leisure. Don't miss your opportunity, schedule your private showing today!NAPLESMLS22$579510
2796034 National Blvd unit 537Ave MariaFL34142
Step into luxury with this turnkey, fully furnished 3rd-floor Birkdale condo, offering breathtaking views of the lake and lush preserve. Boasting a full golf membership, this beautifully maintained 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom residence blends comfort, style, and convenience in every detail. The smart split-bedroom floor plan ensures privacy for guests while keeping the main living areas open and connected. The spacious primary suite features dual closets and serene views, creating a peaceful retreat at the end of the day. A bright, open kitchen with a large center island and luxurious quartz countertops flows seamlessly into the living and dining spaces, making it ideal for entertaining or simply enjoying the view. Elevator access and assigned covered parking add to the ease of everyday living, while all appliances are included--truly move-in ready. Located within the gates of The National Golf & Country Club at Ave Maria, you'll enjoy exclusive access to resort-style amenities that make every day feel like a vacation. Play a round on the championship 18-hole golf course, relax by the zero-entry pool with lap lanes, enjoy casual bites at the poolside bar and grill, or stay active with Har-Tru tennis courts, pickleball, and bocce ball. A state-of-the-art fitness center, rejuvenating sauna, indulgent day spa, and a brand-new clubhouse offering both casual and fine dining indoors and out round out the lifestyle. Just beyond the gates, the charming town of Ave Maria offers parks, dining, shopping, a fun-filled water park, and regular community events at the Town Center. Whether you're looking for a seasonal escape, year-round residence, or investment property, this exceptional condo delivers the perfect balance of comfort, luxury, and leisure. Don't miss your opportunity, schedule your private tour today!NAPLESMLS22$579510
2806034 National Blvd unit 542Ave MariaFL34142
Stunning Birkdale Condo for Rent in The National Golf & Country Club at Ave Maria. Experience resort-style living in this beautifully maintained 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom Birkdale condo. Situated on the top floor, this condo offers breathtaking golf course and lake views from the private, screened lanai, the perfect space for both relaxation and entertaining. Inside, you'll find a bright, open floor plan featuring high-end finishes throughout. The kitchen is a chef's dream, with granite countertops, stainless steel appliances, and custom cabinetry. The spacious living area flows effortlessly into the dining space, making it ideal for hosting guests or enjoying quiet nights in. The master suite is a true retreat, featuring dual walk-in closets and a spa-like en-suite bath with a walk-in shower, providing both comfort and privacy. The guest bedroom is generously sized and offers plenty of space for visitors or family. As a resident of this bundled golf community, you'll have access to world-class amenities, including an 18-hole championship golf course, resort-style pool, fitness center, tennis and pickleball courts, and a stunning clubhouse (coming soon). In addition, this prime location offers easy access to shopping, dining, and the vibrant Ave Maria community. Whether you're looking for a seasonal retreat or a full-time residence, this condo offers the perfect balance of luxury, convenience, and an active lifestyle. Don't miss the opportunity to live in this incredible community and make this beautiful condo your home!NAPLESMLS22$579510

291700 NE 24th St #4504MiamiFL33137
Luxury condo on the 45th floor of Aria Reserve with breathtaking panoramic views of Biscayne Bay! This never-lived-in 1 Bedroom + Den, 2-bath residence features elegant modern design, expansive living areas, and floor-to-ceiling windows that showcase stunning city and bay vistas. The unit is upgraded with glass shower enclosures, LED-lit mirrors in all bathrooms, and designer curtains in the primary bedroom and living space. Located in a premier waterfront tower, Aria Reserve offers unmatched resort-style amenities: private sports marina, spa, tennis, paddleball, squash and basketball courts, mini golf, a dog park, and two pools with water views--including a semi-Olympic pool. Experience elevated living in Miami's most iconic high-rise.RentPath12$700010
292700 NE 24th St #4604MiamiFL33137
This brand new luxury condo has panoramic views of Biscayne Bay, all the way from Key Biscayne to Fort Lauderdale and the ocean beyond. The 1 bedroom, 2 full bath with den features high end appliances, floor to ceiling sliding glass doors, upgraded fixtures, glass showers and backlit mirrors in all bathrooms, a walk-in closet, new shelving, and automatic shades that include blackout shades in the master bedroom. Building amenities include a gym, multiple pools, a spa, yoga studio, a basketball court, tennis courts, movie theater, game room, kids playroom and outdoor grilling areas. The property is located in Edgewater and is just minutes away from Midtown, Wynwood, Miami Beach and Miami International Airport. Take the opportunity to live in Miami's newest waterfront condo.RentPath12$700010

The unit has been completed with the following features: glass shower doors, mirrors with lighting in all bathrooms, designer curtains in the main room & living space. Aria Reserve is situated in a 5-star waterfront location. It redefines resort-style living with its world-class amenities, including a private sports marina, spa, tennis, paddleball, and squash courts, basketball, mini golf, & a private dog park. 377122 Greenwich Ave unit 103GoshenNY10924
Welcome to The Legacy Apartments, Goshen's premier new luxury rental community. The building owner is offering first month complimentary for the holidays. These brand-new 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom units are designed for modern living, featuring spacious open floor plans, gourmet kitchens with gas stove tops and white quartz countertops, in-unit washer/dryers, sleek finishes, and abundant natural light. Only 4 units per floor offer a boutique, private living experience. Building amenities include elevator access, a secure intercom entry system, covered parking, and a rooftop terrace with sweeping views. Enjoy the perfect blend of comfort, style, and convenience. Located in the heart of Goshen, just 10 minutes from Garnet Health Medical Center and minutes from LEGOLAND New York. Exceptional commuter access with close proximity to I-84, I-87, and Route 17, plus public transportation options nearby. Walkable to local shops, dining, and village amenities.Rental Terms:- One month security depositExperience luxury living in one of Orange County's most connected and desirable locations.ONEKEY22$29009

These brand-new 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom units are designed for modern living, featuring spacious open floor plans, gourmet kitchens with gas stove tops and white quartz countertops, in-unit washer/dryers, sleek finishes, and abundant natural light. Only 4 units per floor offer a boutique, private living experience. Building amenities include elevator access, a secure intercom entry system, covered parking, and a rooftop terrace with sweeping views. Enjoy the perfect blend of comfort, style, and convenience. Located in the heart of Goshen, just 10 minutes from Garnet Health Medical Center and minutes from LEGOLAND New York. Exceptional commuter access with close proximity to I-84, I-87, and Route 17, plus public transportation options nearby. Walkable to local shops, dining, and village amenities.Rental Terms:- One month security depositExperience luxury living in one of Orange County's most connected and desirable locations.ONEKEY22$29009

4221502 W Ajo Wy unit 202TucsonAZ85713
At Ajo Properties, we are proud to bring fresh management and a renewed vision to three unique apartment communities in Tucson: Westlake (Buenas at 1502) - 100 units Riverview (Buenas at 1310) - 80 units Santa Cruz (Buenas at 1240) - 44 units Together, our communities offer 224 apartment homes designed for comfort and convenience. We are committed to creating safe, clean, and welcoming living environments for all our residents. As new management, we are actively working to enhance our properties through repairs, renovations, and upgraded amenities. This includes preparing laundry facilities, addressing community needs, and reopening our pools next year. Our mission is to restore these communities to their fullest potential while providing our residents with attentive service and a place they're proud to call home. Come grow with us -- exciting improvements are on the way!APPFOLIO_FREE11$6409

Welcome to Palm Flats, a newly renovated apartment community located in the heart of Tampa, FL. We offer brand-new, renovated two bedroom apartments and townhomes featuring two master size bedrooms with large walk-in closets; in-unit washer and dryer, stainless steel appliances and high-end finishes throughout each apartment. Enjoy outstanding community amenities like our swimming pool and fully-equipped fitness center. Conveniently located near USF, Tampa Palms, and plenty more just minutes away your commute to work or school will be a breeze. Give us a call or stop by our on-site leasing office to see for yourself. We can't wait to welcome you to your new home at Palm Flats!APPFOLIO_FREE22$14499

Enjoy outstanding community amenities like our swimming pool and fully-equipped fitness center. Conveniently located near USF, Tampa Palms, and plenty more just minutes away your commute to work or school will be a breeze. Welcome to Park North Apartments, located in the vibrant city of Houston, TX. Our gated community offers residents a variety of amenities to enhance their lifestyle. Take a dip in our sparkling swimming pool, enjoy outdoor grilling areas for gatherings with friends and family, and let your furry friends run free in our dog park. Stay active in our 24-hour fitness center or practice mindfulness in our yoga studio. Need to get some work done? Visit our business center for all your professional needs. Our bi-lingual staff is here to assist you with any questions or concerns you may have. With 24-hour emergency maintenance, you can rest easy knowing we are here for you. Experience the convenience and comfort of Park North Apartments.APPFOLIO_FREE11$8999

SCHEDULE A SHOWING ONLINE AT: showmojo.com/lrt/5096e84065 ---- Find the newly renovated apartment home you've been searching for at Nordica Landing in Daytona Beach! Set on professionally landscaped lawns, our spacious, freshly renovated one and two bedroom apartment homes provide modern comforts in peaceful surroundings. A tropical oasis just moments away from shopping, the beach, and other exciting events, our welcoming community boasts stylish, renovated finishes and amenities that are perfectly suited to fit your active and busy lifestyle. Convenience is key, and Nordica Landing provides easy access to the rest of Daytona ensuring seamless connectivity to Daytona Speedway, Daytona College, Bethune Cookman, and Embry Riddle. Two Bedroom / Two Bathroom Cats OK ($25/month) No restrictions Dogs OK ($25/month) Large dogs welcome No aggressive breeds allowedSHOWMOJO22$13499

539301 Walkertown Ave unit 101EWinston-SalemNC27105
Spread out and breathe easy in our duplex and triplex apartment homes, tucked beneath mature trees and rolling green lawns that feel more like a private park than an apartment community. Under new ownership and freshly renovated inside and out, The Villas at Park Terrace pairs everyday convenience with space to roam. Why You'll Love Living Here All-New Interiors - Bright white Shaker cabinets, sleek countertops, luxury plank flooring, modern lighting, and a stylish accent wall in every home. Single-Floor Comfort - No upstairs neighbors, no stairs, just roomy one-level layouts that live like a house. Room to Roam - More than 40 acres of grassy lawns and canopy shade perfect for morning jogs, evening strolls, or playtime with pets. Bilingual & Helpful - Nuestro personal habla espanol y siempre esta disponible. Spanish-speaking staff and on-site maintenance keep life running smoothly. Prime Location - Less than three miles to Winston-Salem State University, close to shopping, dining, major employers, and city transit. Easy Qualification - Income requirement just 3x rent, flexible security deposit starting at $695 on two-bedrooms, and quick approvals. Fast Facts Floor Plans: Renovated 2-bedroom duplex & triplex residences Application Fee: $50 per adult (18+) Office Hours: Mon-Fri 8:30 AM - 5:00 PM School District: Winston-Salem/Forsyth County Schools Equal Housing Opportunity * Fair Housing Compliant Ready to enjoy wide-open green space with all the perks of city proximity? Schedule your tour of The Villas at Park Terrace today and experience single-story serenity for yourself.Welcome home to The Villas at Park Terrace -- 40 acres of peaceful, single-story living just minutes from downtown Winston-Salem.APPFOLIO_FREE11$7509

6025728 S Blackstone AveChicagoIL60637
Beautiful courtyard building in Hyde Park! Steps to University of Chicago campus. Open concept studio featuring hardwood floors and great closet space. On site laundry & bike room, on site manager. Heat included. $70 Application Fee per Person. $500 Move-In Fee Total. Cats welcome, sorry no dogs. Rent Includes HeatLISTANZA01$11259
6035728 S Blackstone Ave unit # 105ChicagoIL60637
For more information or to make an appointment to view this apartment call: Gordan, (773) 908-4330 (Photos are Examples of Apartments in the Building and May Not Represent the Currently Available Units) Beautiful courtyard building in Hyde Park! Steps to University of Chicago campus featuring units with hardwood floors, on site laundry, on site manager, grocery stores nearby, restaurant, walking distance to Metra train, walking distance to Museum of Science & Industry, lake, and much more!BUILDIUM01$11259

Vintage updated studio in the heart of Hyde Park. Close to University of Chicago, public transportation and lake front . Utilities included . For more information or to make an appointment to view this apartment call: Chris 312 731 0151 ccrumlish@hunterprop.com (Photos are of actual Unit) Beautiful courtyard building in Hyde Park! 6075728 S Blackstone Ave unit 105ChicagoIL60637
This elegant gated building with wide cobble stone walkway and center manicured floral courtyard arrangement adds a touch of class located in the heart of campus at University of Chicago. This quaint studio has hardwood flooring throughout and ample closet space. The wide kitchen nook is cut out separate from the open floor plan and best of all heat and water are included in the rent. Amenities are on site laundry and bike room for your convenance. You are close to the CTA, MeTra, on campus transportation, walking distance to restaurants, grocery store, general shopping, bike trails, Lake Michigan, Museums and 25 minute ride away from down town Chicago. $75 Application. $500 Move-In Fee.MRED01$11259
6085728 S Blackstone Ave unit 205ChicagoIL60637

This quaint studio has hardwood flooring throughout and ample closet space. The wide kitchen nook is cut out separate from the open floor plan and best of all heat and water are included in the rent. Amenities are on site laundry and bike room for your convenance. You are close to the CTA, MeTra, on campus transportation, walking distance to restaurants, grocery store, general shopping, bike trails, Lake Michigan, Museums and 25 minute ride away from down town Chicago. $75 Application. $500 Move-In Fee.MRED01$11259

Experience UNMATCHED VIEWS from this 54th floor 3 bed/3.5 bath + den residence in Edgewater's BRAND NEW Aria Reserve. Sitting perched above it all, this home offers one of the tower's most commanding vantage points--stretching from Biscayne Bay to the Atlantic, from Key Biscayne to the Miami Beach skyline, all the way to Ft. Lauderdale. Inside features floor-to-ceiling glass windows, an open layout, a modern kitchen with premium appliances, and spacious bedrooms with en-suite baths. The expansive terrace brings the bay right to your living room. Aria Reserve residents enjoy resort-style amenities: multiple pools, spa, fitness center, co-working lounges, and direct bay access--all just minutes from Design District, Midtown, Brickell, the beach, and MIA. 6831 Grand Park Ln unit 6109ThomasvilleGA31757
THOMASVILLE, GEORGIA'S MOST EXCEPTIONAL APARTMENT COMMUNITY You are invited to be one of the first to call Grand Park Apartments home. We are Thomasville, Georgia's newest and most luxurious apartment community. From the moment you drive onto our manicured grounds to when you step into your new apartment home, you'll recognize this as the lifestyle you deserve. Enjoy our resort-style, sparkling, salt water pool with cabanas, grilling area, fire-pits and quarter-mile walking trail. Grand Park has a second floor deck overlooking our courtyard, a 24-hour fitness center, a custom playground and more. Our one, two and three-bedroom living spaces are appointed with granite countertops, white cabinetry, built in microwaves, walk-in closets, laundry room with washer dryer hook-ups and private balconies and patios. Discover more about our luxury living spaces in our Property Details area. Life at Grand Park places you near award-winning schools and abundant shopping and dining options. Our dedicated, professional and friendly management and maintenance team is responsive to your needs. This is your time and Grand Parks is your place. Enjoy luxury living at Grand Parks. We invite you to schedule your personal tour today.APPFOLIO_FREE11$12508

Gorgeous fully renovated Jr 1 bed apt with direct ocean view and balcony at Decoplage Condo! The apt features ceramic floor all over, bathroom with glass shower, kitchenette (not oven), queen size bed and walking closet. The apt is at 15th floor, so luminous and Hight quality furniture. Kitchenette with range, microwave/oven combo and regular size refrigerator.Rent includes 1 parking space thru valet, Wi-Fi, cable tv & electricity. Available March2025, for min 1 mo up to the end of the year.MARMLS01$35008
698100 Lincoln Rd unit 836Miami BeachFL33139
Ocean front, direct beach access, Enjoy stunning ocean & pool views from this studio on the quiet side of the iconic Decoplage. Fully furnished & equipped with balcony, queen bed, blackout shades, tub/shower combo, and sleek decor.Prime location across from the Ritz-Carlton, steps to Lincoln Rd & Ocean Dr. Walking distance to fine eateries, stores, sanctuaries, pharmacies, and banks. Minutes from Miami Intl. Airport. Rent includes utilities, fiber-optic Wi-Fi, cable, and 1 valet parking Amenities: heated infinity pool, gym, beach access, sun deck, library, game room, renovated lobby, laundry on each floor, and 24/7 front desk. No Pets, no smoking, Fast condo online approval. Owner agent. Call for appointment.MARMLS01$35008

7071001 S Forest Ave unit 214Ann ArborMI48104
Spacious Two-Bedroom Apartments Just Minutes from Campus! One of our most popular locations--just a five-minute walk to campus! These spacious two-bedroom apartments feature large living rooms, ample closet space, and double-vanity bathrooms, making them perfect for sharing. Select units have been beautifully updated with hardwood floors and chalkboard accent walls, adding both style and functionality. Residents also enjoy the convenience of on-site laundry facilities and included parking. Experience the perfect combination of comfort, convenience, and charm--all within steps of campus.APPFOLIO_FREE21$24258

7231007 W University Ave unit 106UrbanaIL61801
Built in 2021 Covered Parking Available One of the Closest Urbana Buildings to the Engineering Campus! Located on South Side of University Avenue - No Crossing Busy Streets! Secure Building with FOB Entry System Close to Carle Hospital and OSF Hospitals Many Restaurants Nearby Some Units Have Balconies Fitness Center with Modern NordicTrack Equipment Retail Space on the First Floor Plank Flooring Throughout Stainless Steel Appliance Package Fully Furnished Unit with Full Sized Beds Washer/Dryer in Each Unit Smart TV in Living Room Tenant pays Electric/Gas A Utility Fee of $55 per bed will be assessed for Internet, Trash, Recycling, Water and UC Sanitary Lease Dates: 8/18/26-7/31/27 (Payments are based on a 12 installment lease)BUILDIUM22$19758

7551163 Baltic Ave unit 303TiffinIA52340
Welcome to The Baltic, a new construction apartment complex located in the heart of Tiffin, IA. Conveniently situated at the intersection of I-380 & I-80, this property offers easy access to major highways and future bus stops for effortless commuting. The Baltic boasts a variety of floor plans, including studio, 1, 2, and 3 bedroom options, all featuring luxury vinyl plank flooring, quartz countertops, and stainless steel GE appliances. Each apartment comes with a balcony, perfect for enjoying the outdoors from the comfort of your home. Enjoy the convenience of underground parking and secured building access. The Baltic will also offer the unique feature of commercial businesses on the first floor. Experience the perfect blend of comfort, convenience, and modern living at The Baltic.APPFOLIO_FREE11$13958

80315000 Euclid Ave unit 10East ClevelandOH44112
SCHEDULE A SHOWING ONLINE AT: showmojo.com/lrt/709906d07b ---- Welcome to your new sanctuary! Situated in a vibrant neighborhood, this charming 2-bedroom unit at 15000 Euclid Ave, Cleveland, OH, 44112 - Unit 10 offers the perfect comfort and convenience. Designed for those seeking a peaceful retreat without sacrificing access to the best the city has to offer, this cozy apartment provides an exceptional living experience. We are accepting section 8 vouchers as well. Property Type: * Multi-Family Dwelling: This property is part of a multi-family property, providing you with a community-oriented living environment with multiple units within the building. Interior Features: * Modern Kitchen: The kitchen is well-appointed with essential cabinetry and workspace, making meal preparation a breeze. Enjoy the convenience of modern fixtures and ample storage space. * Comfortable Bedroom: The bedroom offers a peaceful oasis, perfect for unwinding after a busy day. Its tranquil setting ensures a good night's sleep. * Updated Bathroom: The bathroom is clean and functional, with modern fixtures that cater to your daily needs. * Landscaped Surroundings: The apartment is nestled within a beautifully landscaped area, offering a green and serene environment. The lush greenery around the property adds to the tranquil atmosphere, providing a refreshing retreat from the city's hustle and bustle. * Safe and Secure: The property is situated in a safe neighborhood, providing peace of mind for you and your loved ones. The well-lit exterior and secure entryways further enhance the security of your new home. Location Highlights: * Convenient Access: Situated in a desirable neighborhood, this property provides easy access to local shops, dining, and entertainment options. Whether you're a busy professional or a student, you'll appreciate the convenience of having amenities close by. * Vibrant Community: The surrounding area is known for its friendly community atmosphere and offers plenty of opportunities to explore and engage with your neighbors. Additional Information: * Screening: We charge a $25 fee per person over the age of 18 for background checks. Our comprehensive screening process includes credit, background, and eviction checks as well as verification of income, job history, and landlord references. We strive to approve tenants who may not initially think they qualify. Resident Benefit Package: Our mandatory Resident Benefit Package is designed to make your life easier, rewarding, and stress-free. Here's what you get: Pest Share Protection: Covers control for bed bugs, fleas, mites, ticks, & weevils. Credit Building: Boost your credit score with every rent payment--we report it for you! Resident Rewards: Earn cash and discounts worth up to $4,500 annually. No ACH Fees: Enjoy waived $2.49 ACH fees on all online payments. 24/7 Maintenance Line: Round-the-clock access to ensure peace of mind. NSF Fee Waiver: Get one non-sufficient funds (NSF) fee waived per tenancy. Move-in Concierge: One call to set up utilities, cable, and internet. SmartLock Access & FREE Lockbox: Convenient move-in with advanced security. Online Rent Payments & Portal Access: Easy access to your payments and account overview. Vetted Vendor Program: Only insured vendors will service your unit for extra reliability. Take advantage of this comprehensive package for just $49.50/month, designed to enhance your living experience while saving you time and money! * Neighborhood Insight: To get a true sense of the area, we recommend visiting the property at different times of the day. This will give you a realistic feel for the neighborhood's ambiance and what to expect. * Maintenance: B2B Realty ensures that all properties are safe and well-maintained. While tenants are not permitted to make changes or repairs to the property, our dedicated maintenance team is always available to address any issues. Availability: * Self paying Accepted: We are pleased to accept a Self paying applicantSHOWMOJO11$785-$8008

Experience elevated living with an array of premier community amenities designed for comfort and style. Unwind at the resort-style pool with cabanas and elegant lounge areas, or energize your day in the state-of-the-art fitness studio featuring free weights, cardio equipment, and training stations. Enjoy outdoor gatherings at the beautifully landscaped barbecue and picnic spots. Our gated community offers secure access with both covered and surface parking for your convenience. Pet lovers will appreciate our welcoming, pet-friendly environment created with your furry companions in mind. Discover the perfect blend of luxury and leisure--contact our friendly leasing team today to schedule your private tour and find the home that truly fits your lifestyle.HARMLS22$10998

Resort-Style Amenities: - Heated oceanfront pool - Beachside lounge chairs - Fishing pier - Beachfront restaurant - 24/7 security Approved for all short-term rental platforms including Airbnb, Booking, and VRBO. Enjoy unobstructed views of the ocean from every room, and intracoastal views from your massive wraparound balcony, with no neighbors on either side! Unit boasts brand new kitchen, marble floors, spa tub, washer,dryer & tandem parking for two cars. Building offers fitness center, playroom, pool/beach service, TV room, doggie park, 24 hour concierge, valet parking and more. La Perla is located within short distance of fine restaurants, grocery stores, shopping and places of worship. STR-03175. Oceanfront Paradise: Luxury 2-Bedroom Condo This luxurious oceanfront condo features: - 2 bedrooms + versatile den (convertible 3rd bedroom with Murphy beds) - 2.5 bathrooms - Direct ocean views from floor-to-ceiling windows - Private balconies from every room - Elegant marble and wood flooring throughout - Pristine granite kitchen (lightly used) The spacious primary suite offers dual walk-in closets and a luxurious bathroom complete with soaking tub and separate shower. Resort-Style Amenities: - Heated oceanfront pool - Beachside lounge chairs - Fishing pier - Beachfront restaurant - 24/7 security Approved for all short-term rental platforms including Airbnb, Booking, and VRBO. Tastefully furnished 2 bed, 2.5 bathroom in the best 02 line of the building. Enjoy unobstructed views of the ocean from every room, and intracoastal views from your massive wraparound balcony, with no neighbors on either side! Unit boasts brand new kitchen, marble floors, spa tub, washer,dryer & tandem parking for two cars. Building offers fitness center, playroom, pool/beach service, TV room, doggie park, 24 hour concierge, valet parking and more. La Perla is located within short distance of fine restaurants, grocery stores, shopping and places of worship. STR-03362. Find Your Perfect Home at Elmview I Apartments - Modern Living with Exceptional Comfort! Welcome to Elmview I Apartments, where contemporary design meets everyday convenience. Whether you're looking for a spacious 1, 2, or 3 bedroom home, our modern apartments are designed to elevate your lifestyle. Each Apartment Features: - Pet friendly & smoke free - Sleek stainless-steel appliances, in a spacious open-concept kitchen - In-unit washer and dryer - Expansive private deck - Elevator Community Amenities - State-of-the-art fitness center - Heated underground parking - no more scraping ice in winter! - Community room & rooftop terrace - perfect for entertaining - Controlled entry & security cameras for peace of mind Special Offers: First Month Free! Get your first month free when you sign a 12 or 24 month lease! Must meet application requirements to qualify. Refer a Neighbor! Know someone looking for a place? Refer them to us! If they sign a lease and move in, you could receive a $500 rent credit. Contact our office to learn how it works. Gas, water, sewer, snow, and trash removal INCLUDED in rent. Located in Rice County, and served by Faribault Public Schools. With 72 modern units, Elmview I offers everything you need and more. Call us now to book a tour! Disclaimer: Photos are for reference only and may not reflect the exact apartment.APPFOLIO_FREE11$12958

8671750 Sky Lark Ln unit # 1130HoustonTX77056
This apartment is located in the Galleria/Uptown area of Houston TX 77056. Studio apartments start at $1734. One bedroom apartments start at $1874. Two bedroom apartments start at $3058. This property was built in 2014, and has 355 units. *This community is not authorized to accept housing vouchers. *No felony convictions in the last 10 years. *No evictions or broken leases. *No temporary housing. Must rent for 6 months or longer. *You must be employed and have verifiable income. The actual price of this rental is dependent on the day you need to move. The rent can change daily based on availability of the unit. We have placed sleek and modern ceiling fans throughout the apartment.The balcony and patio is a great way to spend time with friends or family. Having a space to sit and relax outside is important for your well being.Enjoy premium hardwood floors, ceramic tile, and upgraded carpet throughout.We have built vaulted ceilings to create a contemporary and generous living space. If you love an open floor plan and do not want to be boxed in, our floor to ceiling windows offers a panaramic view 24/7. Wake up to the sun rise and end the day with the sunset.Our comfortable apartments include air conditioning to keep your home at the forefront of temperature control.Enjoy a wood burning fireplace on chilly nights.Whether you are cooking up a batch of homemade pancakes or making a simple salad, our gourmet kitchens are equipped with all of the necessary tools to make your time in the kitchen a dream. Granite countertops, ample storage, and chef inspired islands keep everything closeby.The kitchen has custom cabinetry for a stylish finish.Each kitchen is equipped with a built in microwave.The dishwasher is energy efficient and high performance. It is the perfect appliance for quick clean up after cooking.The pantry is perfect to keep your food and beverages organized.You will find premium stainless steel or black appliances for an upscale living experience. Wake up to the sun rise and end the day with the sunset.Our comfortable apartments include air conditioning to keep your home at the forefront of temperature control.Enjoy a wood burning fireplace on chilly nights.Whether you are cooking up a batch of homemade pancakes or making a simple salad, our gourmet kitchens are equipped with all of the necessary tools to make your time in the kitchen a dream. Granite countertops, ample storage, and chef inspired islands keep everything closeby.The kitchen has custom cabinetry for a stylish finish.Each kitchen is equipped with a built in microwave.The dishwasher is energy efficient and high performance. It is the perfect appliance for quick clean up after cooking.The pantry is perfect to keep your food and beverages organized.You will find premium stainless steel or black appliances for an upscale living experience. *This community is not authorized to accept housing vouchers. *No felony convictions in the last 10 years. *No evictions or broken leases. *No temporary housing. Two bedroom apartment with two full bathrooms available upstairs. Unit has fridge, stove, and dishwasher. Water and trash paid for and monthly pest control! Rooms are equal size with walk in closets. Plenty of storage space available in the hallway and bathrooms. Pet friendly with one time fee, must be under 35lbs. Two laundry rooms, two pools, and basketball and tennis court! To Apply: We ask for two forms of identification and proof of income. 3x the monthly rent. Bad credit or no credit ok! Call or stop by for a tour 956-383-8382 1709 W Schunior St November Special: One Month Free Rent Just a few minutes away from UTRGV. Catch the shuttle directly across from us! UTRGV students receive between $270 (9 month lease) or $360(12 month lease) off their first month!BUILDIUM22$8258

8911825 Oakview Ave SE unit 108AlexandriaMN56308
BRAND NEW! Hillside Apartments Be among the first to experience exceptional living at Hillside Apartments -- Alexandria's newest apartment community designed with comfort, convenience, and community in mind. This is the first of several buildings coming to the Hillside development, with future phases underway. Whether you're looking for a studio or need multiple bedrooms, Hillside offers modern layouts and features to fit your lifestyle. Gorgeous 2 bed/ 2 bath unit for rent located in the Keystone area. Unit has breathtaking views of the canal, bay area, Bal Harbour, and Miami Skyline. Welcome to our spacious apartments! We offer a variety of large 1, 2, and 3-bedroom apartments to suit your needs. The best part? Our community boasts a range of amenities to enhance your living experience. Take advantage of our playground, perfect for outdoor fun and entertainment. Enjoy a delicious barbecue with friends and family at our BBQ area. For your convenience, we have on-site laundry facilities, ensuring that you never have to worry about finding a laundromat. Our dedicated property manager and maintenance team are always available to address any concerns or requests you may have. Our apartments offer easy access to a variety of dining, shopping, and entertainment options. Whether you're looking for a cozy one-bedroom or a spacious three-bedroom apartment, our community has the perfect home for you. Don't miss out on this opportunity to live in a comfortable and convenient apartment. Contact us today to schedule a tour. *Please be advised that advertised pricing is the starting price for the unit. Rental pricing may increase based on your income. Pricing for your apartment is based on your income.*APPFOLIO_FREE21$12548

9472901 Boston Ave unit D-12Des MoinesIA50310
Welcome to Clover Creek! Experience contemporary comfort and convenience in our serene neighborhood at Clover Creek Our pet-friendly community provides a variety of spacious Studio, 1, 2, and 3 bedroom units tailored to suit your lifestyle. Apartment Features & Amenities: - Enjoy the luxury of private patios or balconies (availability varies by floor). - Benefit from complimentary parking for your convenience. - Garages are also available for added convenience! - We're a pet-friendly community, welcoming up to 2 pets per unit with a one-time non-refundable pet fee plus a monthly pet rent of per pet. Screening Criteria: - Ensure that your household gross monthly income is 2.5 times the base rent. - Maintain a minimum credit score of 525. - No collections (excluding student loans and medical payments). - Uphold a clean criminal history and rental record. - Provide a valid US ID or SSN, or have a cosigner with a valid US ID or SSN. Utility Policies: - Common area utilities (electric, water, sewer, and trash) are arranged by the landlord. Apply today and immerse yourself in the perfect blend of modern living and tranquility at Clover Creek. Your new home is waiting! *Income RestrictedAPPFOLIO_FREE01$6118

Welcome to Clover Creek! Experience contemporary comfort and convenience in our serene neighborhood at Clover Creek Our pet-friendly community provides a variety of spacious Studio, 1, 2, and 3 bedroom units tailored to suit your lifestyle. Apartment Features & Amenities: - Enjoy the luxury of private patios or balconies (availability varies by floor). - Benefit from complimentary parking for your convenience. - Garages are also available for added convenience! - We're a pet-friendly community, welcoming up to 2 pets per unit with a one-time non-refundable pet fee plus a monthly pet rent of per pet. Screening Criteria: - Ensure that your household gross monthly income is 2.5 times the base rent. - Maintain a minimum credit score of 525. - No collections (excluding student loans and medical payments). - Uphold a clean criminal history and rental record. - Provide a valid US ID or SSN, or have a cosigner with a valid US ID or SSN. Utility Policies: - Common area utilities (electric, water, sewer, and trash) are arranged by the landlord. Apply today and immerse yourself in the perfect blend of modern living and tranquility at Clover Creek. Your new home is waiting! *Income RestrictedAPPFOLIO_FREE01$6118

955301 Walkertown Ave unit 102SWinston-SalemNC27105
Spread out and breathe easy in our duplex and triplex apartment homes, tucked beneath mature trees and rolling green lawns that feel more like a private park than an apartment community. Under new ownership and freshly renovated inside and out, The Villas at Park Terrace pairs everyday convenience with space to roam. Why You'll Love Living Here All-New Interiors - Bright white Shaker cabinets, sleek countertops, luxury plank flooring, modern lighting, and a stylish accent wall in every home. Single-Floor Comfort - No upstairs neighbors, no stairs, just roomy one-level layouts that live like a house. Room to Roam - More than 40 acres of grassy lawns and canopy shade perfect for morning jogs, evening strolls, or playtime with pets. Bilingual & Helpful - Nuestro personal habla espanol y siempre esta disponible. Spanish-speaking staff and on-site maintenance keep life running smoothly. Prime Location - Less than three miles to Winston-Salem State University, close to shopping, dining, major employers, and city transit. Easy Qualification - Income requirement just 3x rent, flexible security deposit starting at $695 on two-bedrooms, and quick approvals. Fast Facts Floor Plans: Renovated 2-bedroom duplex & triplex residences Application Fee: $50 per adult (18+) Office Hours: Mon-Fri 8:30 AM - 5:00 PM School District: Winston-Salem/Forsyth County Schools Equal Housing Opportunity * Fair Housing Compliant Ready to enjoy wide-open green space with all the perks of city proximity? Schedule your tour of The Villas at Park Terrace today and experience single-story serenity for yourself.Welcome home to The Villas at Park Terrace -- 40 acres of peaceful, single-story living just minutes from downtown Winston-Salem.APPFOLIO_FREE21$9508

979327 Pine St #3014PawtucketRI2860
Experience upscale living in these newly constructed (2025) luxury apartments, ideally located just steps from the new Pawtucket-Central Falls Train Station and minutes from Centreville Bank Stadium's concerts, sports, shopping, and dining. Spacious 1-bedroom units start at $1,600/month, offering open-concept layouts with luxury vinyl plank flooring and high-efficiency electric utilities. Each apartment provides modern comfort and convenience with secure key fob entry, on-site gym, on-site laundry, and private parking. Residents can unwind in the beautiful outdoor courtyard, designed for community connection and relaxation.RentPath11$16008
980327 Pine St unit 2014PawtucketRI2860
Welcome to Pine St Apartments in Pawtucket, RI! Our community offers a variety of amenities to enhance your living experience. Take your furry friend to our on-site dog park for some playtime, or break a sweat in our state-of-the-art gym. Our location near the train station and makes commuting a breeze. Relax in our peaceful courtyard or get some work done in our designated work station. Rest easy knowing your vehicle is secure in our gated lot, and easily access your apartment with the convenience of an elevator. Experience comfort and convenience at Pine St Apartments.APPFOLIO_FREE11$16008

984327 Pine St unit 3014PawtucketRI2860
Experience upscale living in these newly constructed (2025) luxury apartments, ideally located just steps from the new Pawtucket-Central Falls Train Station and minutes from Centreville Bank Stadium's concerts, sports, shopping, and dining. Spacious 1-bedroom units start at $1,600/month, offering open-concept layouts with luxury vinyl plank flooring and high-efficiency electric utilities. Each apartment provides modern comfort and convenience with secure key fob entry, on-site gym, on-site laundry, and private parking. Residents can unwind in the beautiful outdoor courtyard, designed for community connection and relaxation.RIS11$16008

Step into style at The Trousdale! Our 1 bedroom, 1 bath is now going for $1,299 and comes with a washer and dryer included--no extra hassle, no extra cost. Cool off at our iconic T-shaped pool, break a sweat in the 24-hour fitness center, and bring your furry friend along--our onsite dog park is the perfect hangout for pups. Located in the heart of Oak Lawn, you'll be surrounded by Dallas' trendiest restaurants, vibrant nightlife, and premier shopping. Enjoy 8 weeks free on an 18-month lease, plus furnished options available to make your move even easier. Come see why The Trousdale is the perfect mix of comfort, convenience, and style!TURBOTENANT11$12998

1001301 Walkertown Ave unit 101SWinston-SalemNC27105
Spread out and breathe easy in our duplex and triplex apartment homes, tucked beneath mature trees and rolling green lawns that feel more like a private park than an apartment community. Under new ownership and freshly renovated inside and out, The Villas at Park Terrace pairs everyday convenience with space to roam. Why You'll Love Living Here All-New Interiors - Bright white Shaker cabinets, sleek countertops, luxury plank flooring, modern lighting, and a stylish accent wall in every home. Single-Floor Comfort - No upstairs neighbors, no stairs, just roomy one-level layouts that live like a house. Room to Roam - More than 40 acres of grassy lawns and canopy shade perfect for morning jogs, evening strolls, or playtime with pets. Bilingual & Helpful - Nuestro personal habla espanol y siempre esta disponible. Spanish-speaking staff and on-site maintenance keep life running smoothly. Prime Location - Less than three miles to Winston-Salem State University, close to shopping, dining, major employers, and city transit. Easy Qualification - Income requirement just 3x rent, flexible security deposit starting at $695 on two-bedrooms, and quick approvals. Fast Facts Floor Plans: Renovated 2-bedroom duplex & triplex residences Application Fee: $50 per adult (18+) Office Hours: Mon-Fri 8:30 AM - 5:00 PM School District: Winston-Salem/Forsyth County Schools Equal Housing Opportunity * Fair Housing Compliant Ready to enjoy wide-open green space with all the perks of city proximity? Schedule your tour of The Villas at Park Terrace today and experience single-story serenity for yourself.Welcome home to The Villas at Park Terrace -- 40 acres of peaceful, single-story living just minutes from downtown Winston-Salem.APPFOLIO_FREE21$85090

Spread out and breathe easy in our duplex and triplex apartment homes, tucked beneath mature trees and rolling green lawns that feel more like a private park than an apartment community. Under new ownership and freshly renovated inside and out, The Villas at Park Terrace pairs everyday convenience with space to roam. Why You'll Love Living Here All-New Interiors - Bright white Shaker cabinets, sleek countertops, luxury plank flooring, modern lighting, and a stylish accent wall in every home. Single-Floor Comfort - No upstairs neighbors, no stairs, just roomy one-level layouts that live like a house. Room to Roam - More than 40 acres of grassy lawns and canopy shade perfect for morning jogs, evening strolls, or playtime with pets. Bilingual & Helpful - Nuestro personal habla espanol y siempre esta disponible. Spanish-speaking staff and on-site maintenance keep life running smoothly. Prime Location - Less than three miles to Winston-Salem State University, close to shopping, dining, major employers, and city transit. Easy Qualification - Income requirement just 3x rent, flexible security deposit starting at $695 on two-bedrooms, and quick approvals. 1088301 Walkertown Ave unit 406LWinston-SalemNC27105
Spread out and breathe easy in our duplex and triplex apartment homes, tucked beneath mature trees and rolling green lawns that feel more like a private park than an apartment community. Under new ownership and freshly renovated inside and out, The Villas at Park Terrace pairs everyday convenience with space to roam. Why You'll Love Living Here All-New Interiors - Bright white Shaker cabinets, sleek countertops, luxury plank flooring, modern lighting, and a stylish accent wall in every home. Single-Floor Comfort - No upstairs neighbors, no stairs, just roomy one-level layouts that live like a house. Room to Roam - More than 40 acres of grassy lawns and canopy shade perfect for morning jogs, evening strolls, or playtime with pets. Bilingual & Helpful - Nuestro personal habla espanol y siempre esta disponible. Spanish-speaking staff and on-site maintenance keep life running smoothly. 11961 Grand Park LnThomasvilleGA31757
THOMASVILLE, GEORGIA'S MOST EXCEPTIONAL APARTMENT COMMUNITY You are invited to be one of the first to call Grand Park Apartments home. We are Thomasville, Georgia's newest and most luxurious apartment community. From the moment you drive onto our manicured grounds to when you step into your new apartment home, you'll recognize this as the lifestyle you deserve. Enjoy our resort-style, sparkling, salt water pool with cabanas, grilling area, fire-pits and quarter-mile walking trail. Grand Park has a second floor deck overlooking our courtyard, a 24-hour fitness center, a custom playground and more. Our one, two and three-bedroom living spaces are appointed with granite countertops, white cabinetry, built in microwaves, walk-in closets, laundry room with washer dryer hook-ups and private balconies and patios. Discover more about our luxury living spaces in our Property Details area. Life at Grand Park places you near award-winning schools and abundant shopping and dining options. Our dedicated, professional and friendly management and maintenance team is responsive to your needs. This is your time and Grand Parks is your place. Enjoy luxury living at Grand Parks. We invite you to schedule your personal tour today.APPFOLIO_FREE22$142548

Enjoy our resort-style, sparkling, salt water pool with cabanas, grilling area, fire-pits and quarter-mile walking trail. Grand Park has a second floor deck overlooking our courtyard, a 24-hour fitness center, a custom playground and more. Our one, two and three-bedroom living spaces are appointed with granite countertops, white cabinetry, built in microwaves, walk-in closets, laundry room with washer dryer hook-ups and private balconies and patios. Discover more about our luxury living spaces in our Property Details area. Life at Grand Park places you near award-winning schools and abundant shopping and dining options. From the moment you drive onto our manicured grounds to when you step into your new apartment home, you'll recognize this as the lifestyle you deserve. Enjoy our resort-style, sparkling, salt water pool with cabanas, grilling area, fire-pits and quarter-mile walking trail. Grand Park has a second floor deck overlooking our courtyard, a 24-hour fitness center, a custom playground and more. Our one, two and three-bedroom living spaces are appointed with granite countertops, white cabinetry, built in microwaves, walk-in closets, laundry room with washer dryer hook-ups and private balconies and patios. Discover more about our luxury living spaces in our Property Details area. Life at Grand Park places you near award-winning schools and abundant shopping and dining options. Our dedicated, professional and friendly management and maintenance team is responsive to your needs. This is your time and Grand Parks is your place. Enjoy luxury living at Grand Parks. We invite you to schedule your personal tour today.APPFOLIO_FREE22$142548

Experience living with Landing Every apartment is outfitted with all the modern essentials including: custom-designed furnishings, a fully-equipped kitchen with deluxe stainless steel appliances, a gourmet coffee maker, premium linens, Smart TVs, and incredibly fast, reliable internet for working from home. When you live with Landing, you'll enjoy a hassle-free experience with the added benefit of 24/7 access to our dedicated member experience team. Some of the nitty-gritty: a background check and proof of income are required; we're completely smoke-free; bundled utility packages and pricing vary based on length of stay; pet-friendly options available; listed price reflects a 12-month minimum stay.HELLOLANDING11$214337

1502302 S 2nd St unit 202ChampaignIL61820
Amazing one beds! Completely renovated in 2019! Campus View is an 8 story building with 2 elevators, right on 2nd & White St. Prime location with a bus stop right outside the doors. This building was completely renovated in 2019 with luxury vinyl flooring, granite countertops, stainless steel appliance package with dishwasher, high speed fiber internet. Water and heat included in rent. This building also includes a Fitness center, study room, & a tenant lounge. Contact us today for a showing! 217-356-8750 Green Street Realty www.greenstrealty.comBUILDIUM11$117532

1565381 Whitetail Lane unit 101JacksonMN56143
Sign a 12-month lease and receive 2 months of free rent, with flexible options to fit your needs if you sign a lease: *Option 1: Take 1 month free upfront, and apply the second month as a monthly discount over the remaining 11 months. *Option 2: Spread the full value of 2 months free evenly across all 12 months for consistent savings. Welcome to Belmont Heights, where contemporary design and natural beauty come together in a picturesque rural setting. Set on 36 acres, this new market rate development offers modern apartments and townhomes for those seeking upscale comfort just minutes from work. Designed with young professionals and families in mind, these spacious homes feature sleek finishes like quartz countertops, stainless steel appliances, and in-unit washers and dryers--all in the heart of the vibrant, outdoorsy Minnesota community. With easy access to Jackson's industrial park, scenic walking and biking trails, and the serene Des Moines River nearby, Belmont Heights brings you close to both nature and career opportunities. Discover a beautiful balance of work, play, and relaxation on one of the highest points in the city. Come home to Belmont Heights--where rural roots meet modern living. Phase 2 - The Heights II - Apartment Development Starting 2026APPFOLIO_FREE21$112530

Designed with young professionals and families in mind, these spacious homes feature sleek finishes like quartz countertops, stainless steel appliances, and in-unit washers and dryers--all in the heart of the vibrant, outdoorsy Minnesota community. With easy access to Jackson's industrial park, scenic walking and biking trails, and the serene Des Moines River nearby, Belmont Heights brings you close to both nature and career opportunities. Discover a beautiful balance of work, play, and relaxation on one of the highest points in the city. Come home to Belmont Heights--where rural roots meet modern living. Phase 2 - The Heights II - Apartment Development Starting 2026APPFOLIO_FREE21$112530

1595902 Romeria Dr unit 101AustinTX78757
Welcome to Sunset Palms, the place where modern living meets the true Austin lifestyle. Tucked into the trendy Brentwood neighborhood, this is the kind of community that makes every day feel fun, fresh, and effortlessly cool. Step into your newly renovated 1x1 home featuring sleek quartz countertops, designer cabinetry, wood-style flooring, and gorgeous ceramic finishes--all complemented by smart-home technology that puts comfort and convenience right at your fingertips. Here, you're surrounded by everything that makes Austin Austin: - Epoch Coffee for your morning fix - Michi Ramen and The Peached Tortilla for your foodie adventures - Pinthouse Pizza for the perfect slice - Breakaway Records and Austin's best thrift shops just minutes away Walk it, bike it, live it--Brentwood's charm and energy are all around you. Sunset Palms isn't just a place to live... it's a place to thrive. Come experience the best of Central Austin living!APPFOLIO_FREE11$83929

Step into your newly renovated 1x1 home featuring sleek quartz countertops, designer cabinetry, wood-style flooring, and gorgeous ceramic finishes--all complemented by smart-home technology that puts comfort and convenience right at your fingertips. Here, you're surrounded by everything that makes Austin Austin: - Epoch Coffee for your morning fix - Michi Ramen and The Peached Tortilla for your foodie adventures - Pinthouse Pizza for the perfect slice - Breakaway Records and Austin's best thrift shops just minutes away Walk it, bike it, live it--Brentwood's charm and energy are all around you. Sunset Palms isn't just a place to live... it's a place to thrive. Come experience the best of Central Austin living!APPFOLIO_FREE11$83929

17087600 Blanco Rd unit 1102San AntonioTX78216
Welcome to The Escapade Apartments, your new home in the heart of San Antonio, TX. Our community offers a variety of amenities designed to enhance your living experience. Dive into one of our three sparkling swimming pools or keep up with your fitness goals in our well-equipped fitness center. For sports enthusiasts, our tennis court is ready for your next match. We also offer a convenient laundry facility, making your daily chores easier. Enjoy a fun-filled weekend at our BBQ area or take your furry friend to our dog park for some playtime. For those who work from home, our business center provides a professional environment for you to focus. Our 24-hour emergency maintenance ensures your comfort at all times. Plus, our walking trail is perfect for a leisurely stroll or a morning jog. Experience the best of San Antonio living at The Escapade Apartments.APPFOLIO_FREE11$120928

Featuring fully remodeled apartments with GRANITE countertops, NEW cabinets, BLACK APPLIANCES, brand new remodeled bathrooms with luxury PORCELAIN tile bathtub enclosures, tile floors throughout, walk-in closets (select units), and much more. We offer affordable luxury in the heart of the USF area within a GATED COMMUNITY in the perfect location. The Wave Apartments is located minutes from The University of South Florida, University Mall, Moffitt Cancer Hospital, VA Hospital, AdventHealth, Shriners Hospitals, St. Joseph's Hospital, Florida Hospital, many restaurants, shopping, and much more. Amenities include a refreshing pool with sun deck, pet walking areas, 24 hour onsite laundry facility, 24 hour emergency maintenance, onsite management office, lots of free parking, and public transportation right out front. Availability is limited. Call now before they're gone!APPFOLIO_FREE11$107526

1868100 Lincoln Rd #1206Miami BeachFL33139
South Beach living at its best! Updated & Partially Furnished 530 sq ft. studio in South Beach with ocean view. Open Studio includes one full bath, open kitchen features granite counters, & stainless steel appliances (dishwasher, electric cooktop stove, & refrigerator). NEW AC, FRESH PAINTED. This is a beautiful high rise, updated lobby, resort style, amenities galore (directly across from the Ritz Carlton Hotel). Rent includes AC (Save on Electric bill) Basic Cable TV, Internet. It has a newer heated swimming pool overlooking the ocean, state of the art gym, valet parking with 24 hour security. Enjoy all that Famous Lincoln Rd has to offer!RentPath01$250025
1869100 Lincoln Rd #1220Miami BeachFL33139
STUDIO, AT THE FAMOUS DECOPLAGE BUILDING WITHIN WALKING DISTANCE TO THE BEACH AND THE MOST TRENDY RESTAURANTS AND PLACES IN SOUTH BEACH. WHERE LINCOLN RD MEETS THE OCEAN, ACROSS FROM THE RITZ-CARLTON AND NEXT TO THE LOWS HOTEL. RENOVATED HEATED POOL AND GYM.** FULLY FURNISHED UNIT** (WATER, SEWER, CABLE, WIFI AND VALET PARKING SPACE INCLUDED IN THE RENT)** Rent price may vary for short-term rentals (less than 6 months) and winter season (NOVEMBER - APRIL)** Move out $ 160.00 cleaning fee will be paid upfront*RentPath01$250025
1870100 Lincoln Rd #1601Miami BeachFL33139
Ocean front, direct beach access, renovated large, bright and clean apartment at the Decoplage. All white quartz floors & countertops. White Glossy cabinets. Walk in Closet. Spa area with Rain Shower & glass doors. Make this your perfect Vacation spot or long term home. Sleeps 4. Fully Furnished. Rent includes water, high speed internet, digital cable TV, electricity, Gym, 1 valet parking for free, infinity heated pool, game room, library, piano, social lounge at the mezzanine and children play room. Fast online approval. $50 application fee. Condominium approval needed. Priced here for year lease. Call now for availability, pricing and showing appointment. Laundry rooms on every floor. Walking distance to shops, restaurants, Lincoln Mall, 11 miles to Miami International Airport. No Pets.RentPath01$250025

1893120 S Burdick St unit E-1StillwaterOK74074
Welcome to Wellsprings Apartments, your new home in the heart of Stillwater, OK. Our apartments are equipped with essential amenities such as a stove, dishwasher, and refrigerator, ensuring a comfortable and convenient living experience. We also offer unique features that set us apart. Enjoy full access to our club house, perfect for socializing and relaxing. For outdoor enthusiasts, our family picnic sites are ideal for a sunny afternoon. As a resident of Wellsprings Apartments, you'll receive a complimentary membership to White Barn Estates for the duration of your lease. This membership opens up a world of recreational activities. Test your skills on the Par-3 golf course or the mini golf course (please note, golf carts are not included but can be rented for $15.00). Engage in a friendly match at the sand volleyball court or unwind with some catch and release fishing. We understand that pets are part of the family, which is why we welcome them with a deposit. Stay connected with our Wi-Fi service, ensuring you're never out of touch. At Wellsprings Apartments, we provide more than just a place to live, we offer a lifestyle. Come and join our community today!APPFOLIO_FREE01$90025

Test your skills on the Par-3 golf course or the mini golf course (please note, golf carts are not included but can be rented for $15.00). Engage in a friendly match at the sand volleyball court or unwind with some catch and release fishing. We understand that pets are part of the family, which is why we welcome them with a deposit. Stay connected with our Wi-Fi service, ensuring you're never out of touch. At Wellsprings Apartments, we provide more than just a place to live, we offer a lifestyle. Come and join our community today!APPFOLIO_FREE01$90025

1918555 N Dean Rd unit A-01AuburnAL36830
Welcome to The Vue on Dean, where you'll find a variety of appealing living spaces to suit your needs. Whether you're looking for a cozy 1 bedroom, 1 bathroom retreat or a roomier 2 bedroom, 2 bathroom haven, we have the perfect home for you. All our units come with the convenience of in-unit laundry facilities, making chores a breeze. If you're seeking a shared living arrangement, our 2 bedroom, 2 bathroom layout is ideal for roommates, as both bedrooms are generously sized and boast their own 3-piece bathrooms for added privacy. The Vue on Dean offers a range of amenities to enhance your living experience. Enjoy the serenity of our beautifully landscaped grounds, take a dip in the refreshing swimming pool, or stay active in our fitness center. In your apartment, you'll find modern touches like granite countertops, a dishwasher, and a microwave, simplifying your daily routine. Pet lovers will appreciate our dog park and pet-friendly policies, ensuring that your furry family members feel right at home here. Experience the convenience and comfort of our community while enjoying the peace and quiet that comes with living in this lovely setting. Make this your new home and discover all that our complex has to offer. Please call our VUE representative at 334-752-0021 for more details or to schedule a tour time.APPFOLIO_FREE22$162525

Whether you're looking for a cozy 1 bedroom, 1 bathroom retreat or a roomier 2 bedroom, 2 bathroom haven, we have the perfect home for you. All our units come with the convenience of in-unit laundry facilities, making chores a breeze. If you're seeking a shared living arrangement, our 2 bedroom, 2 bathroom layout is ideal for roommates, as both bedrooms are generously sized and boast their own 3-piece bathrooms for added privacy. The Vue on Dean offers a range of amenities to enhance your living experience. Enjoy the serenity of our beautifully landscaped grounds, take a dip in the refreshing swimming pool, or stay active in our fitness center. In your apartment, you'll find modern touches like granite countertops, a dishwasher, and a microwave, simplifying your daily routine. Pet lovers will appreciate our dog park and pet-friendly policies, ensuring that your furry family members feel right at home here. Experience the convenience and comfort of our community while enjoying the peace and quiet that comes with living in this lovely setting. Make this your new home and discover all that our complex has to offer. Please call our VUE representative at 334-752-0021 for more details or to schedule a tour time.APPFOLIO_FREE22$162525
